mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM member_bank_card t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.id},'%')
AND t.member_id like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.memberId},'%')
AND t.card_num like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.cardNum},'%')
AND t.open_account like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.openAccount},'%')
AND t.bank_name like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.bankName},'%')
AND t.phone like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.phone},'%')
AND t.card_url like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.cardUrl},'%')
AND t.valid_date like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.validDate},'%')
AND t.card_type like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.cardType},'%')
AND t.bank_type like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.bankType},'%')
AND t.city like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.city},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.status},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM member_bank_card t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.id},'%')
AND t.member_id like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.memberId},'%')
AND t.card_num like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.cardNum},'%')
AND t.open_account like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.openAccount},'%')
AND t.bank_name like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.bankName},'%')
AND t.phone like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.phone},'%')
AND t.card_url like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.cardUrl},'%')
AND t.valid_date like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.validDate},'%')
AND t.card_type like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.cardType},'%')
AND t.bank_type like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.bankType},'%')
AND t.city like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.city},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.status},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{memberBankCardEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM member_bank_card t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
